summary: iOS | FOCUS 2 | Apps settings section is missing
scenario: "Apps" section with Amazon Alexa and Tile options missing from Device Settings for Voyager Focus 2 on iOS
description_clean: On iOS, after pairing a Voyager Focus 2 headset and navigating to Device settings, the "Apps" section is missing. According to the Focus 2 UI specs, the Apps section should be present with Amazon Alexa and Tile options.
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS.
2. Pair a Voyager Focus 2 headset to the iOS device.
4. Tap on the paired Voyager Focus 2 device name to open Device Settings.
5. Scroll down to view all available sections in Device Settings.
expected: The "Apps" section should be present in Device Settings, containing Amazon Alexa and Tile options.
actual: The "Apps" section is missing from Device Settings. No Amazon Alexa or Tile options are displayed.
